case_title: TERRY HSU VS. MELISSA SIMPSON ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2022 - JUDGMENT.
(SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR MICHELLE HSU TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF TERRY FILED BY PLAINTIFF HSU, TERRY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $622.72 FILED BY HSU, TERRY AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, MELISSA SIMPSON, ARRON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF DECLARATION (SERVICE FEE $35) FILED BY DEFENDANT SIMPSON, MELISSA
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD AT WINDOW FROM DEFENDANTS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-22-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-22-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF TERRY HSU IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MICHELLE HSU, DAUGHTER. DEFENDANT MELISSA SIMPSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AARON SIMPSON IS PRESENT. THE COURT ALLOWED MICHELLE HSU TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF, HER FATHER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HSU, TERRY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SIMPSON, MELISSA SIMPSON, ARRON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
